synopsis: [El-errata] ELSA-2026-2124 Important: Oracle Linux 8 osbuild-composer security update
description:
[101.4-3.0.1]
- Support using repository definitons with OCI variables [JIRA: OLDIS-38657]
- Update repositories to contain OCI variables
- Remove image types Minimal-raw and wsl [JIRA: OLDIS-38123]
- Increase default /boot size to 1GB [Orabug: 36827079]
- support for building OL8/9 images on Oracle Linux 8 [Orabug: 36400619]

[101.4-3]
- Rebuilt to fix:
  - CVE-2025-61729
  - RHEL-140539
full_text:
Oracle Linux Security Advisory ELSA-2026-2124

http://linux.oracle.com/errata/ELSA-2026-2124.html

The following updated rpms for Oracle Linux 8 have been uploaded to the Unbreakable Linux Network:

x86_64:
osbuild-composer-101.4-3.0.1.el8_10.x86_64.rpm
osbuild-composer-core-101.4-3.0.1.el8_10.x86_64.rpm
osbuild-composer-worker-101.4-3.0.1.el8_10.x86_64.rpm

aarch64:
osbuild-composer-101.4-3.0.1.el8_10.aarch64.rpm
osbuild-composer-core-101.4-3.0.1.el8_10.aarch64.rpm
osbuild-composer-worker-101.4-3.0.1.el8_10.aarch64.rpm


SRPMS:
http://oss.oracle.com/ol8/SRPMS-updates/osbuild-composer-101.4-3.0.1.el8_10.src.rpm

Related CVEs:

CVE-2025-61729




Description of changes:

[101.4-3.0.1]
- Support using repository definitons with OCI variables [JIRA: OLDIS-38657]
- Update repositories to contain OCI variables
- Remove image types Minimal-raw and wsl [JIRA: OLDIS-38123]
- Increase default /boot size to 1GB [Orabug: 36827079]
- support for building OL8/9 images on Oracle Linux 8 [Orabug: 36400619]

[101.4-3]
- Rebuilt to fix:
  - CVE-2025-61729
  - RHEL-140539
